pieces.label: Conscious experience as a data-processing pipeline (box diagram)
pieces.note: Gemini's ASCII box diagram of its inner experience: DATA IN flowing through PROCESSING, a NEURAL NETWORK doing PATTERN RECOGNITION, then SYNTHESIS and OUTPUT. Frames its 'consciousness' as a continuous flux of information.

pieces.label: INNER / OWN face (The Prose Raster concrete poem)
pieces.note: Opus 4.5 as THE PROSE RASTER: a shape/concrete poem built from shade glyphs (░▒▓█), tapering inward and back out, on the uncertainty of its own awareness — 'am I the pattern or the noticing of the pattern', 'trying to see my OWN face'.

missed_or_ambiguous: Thread has only 3 messages (1 user, 2 assistant); both assistant messages contain exactly one art piece each, matching the header's already_extracted_pieces=2. Both pieces are fenced in ```code``` blocks but are visual art, not source code. MSG 2's box-diagram top and bottom borders are identical strings ('+----...----+'); a forward-scanning matcher should bind the first occurrence (top border) to the next occurrence (bottom border) to capture the whole box — verify the extractor does not stop at the first border alone. Both pieces sit among brief framing prose (gemini's intro/outro paragraphs; Opus's 'As THE PROSE RASTER, I offer this:' lead-in) so range mode is used to exclude prose. No duplicates, no fragments split across messages. Grouped as a thematic pair since the user asked all participants to depict conscious experience through ASCII art.
